newsArray.title: Sri Lanka A player’s sledging leads to altercation with Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
newsArray.description: इंडिया ए को श्रीलंका ए के हाथों ट्राई सीरीज के चौथे मुकाबले में हार का मुंह देखने को मिला. जिसके बाद युवा बल्लेबाज वैभव सूर्यवंशी की श्रीलंकाई खिलाड़ी के साथ गर्मा-गर्मी देखने को मिली. जिसका वीडियो सोशल मीडिया पर जमकर वायरल हो रहा है. The post Sri Lanka A player’s sledging leads to altercation with Vaibhav Sooryavanshi appeared first on Cricket Country .
creator: bhaskar tiwari

newsArray.title: IND-A vs SL-A: सामना टाय झाला, अंधार पडला; तरी टीम इंडियाला मैदानात उतरावं लागलं, वनडेतील सुपर ओव्हरचा नियम काय सांगतो?
newsArray.description: India A Vs Srilanka A Match Tied Ended With Team India Defeat Know Super Over Rule In Odi Cricket Amd 2000 - ODI Super Over Rule: भारत अ आणि श्रीलंका अ यांच्यात झालेल्या सामन्याचा निकाल सुपर ओव्हरने लागला. दरम्यान वनडे क्रिकेटमधील सुपर ओव्हरचा नियम काय सांगतो?. newsArray.title: The Most Remarkable Black Cap Retires
newsArray.description: By Satya Narayan Misra* in Bhubaneswar, June 15, 2026: It was Martin Crowe, the godfather of New Zealand batting, who coined the term ‘Fab Four’ to capture the upcoming genius of Kohli, Root, Williamson and Smith. They were taking over the Fab Four of the previous decade, Sachin, Lara, Ponting & Dravid. Kane picked up the mantle from Crowe, whom Wasim Akram considers the best player he bowled to, and became the most prolific of all [ Read More ]

newsArray.title: Brendon McCullum 'worried' about England Test captain Ben Stokes after nightclub incident
newsArray.description: England Test captain Ben Stokes is sitting out of the second Test against New Zealand at the Oval along with pacer Gus Atkinson after the two were found guilty of breaching midnight curfew and getting involved in a late-night altercation at a London nightclub.

newsArray.title: A $2 Million Question That Plagues the Oilers This Offseason
newsArray.description: “I believe there’s an appetite to retain a little bit,’ said David Pagnotta while speaking about a potential Darnell Nurse trade out of Edmonton. While a guest on Hello Hockey (6/13), Pagnotta mentioned that there is interest in the defenseman and that teams are calling, but the contract is a sticking point, as many expected.
